reimagined.config.panel_width_ratio.tool: Controls how much of the screen width is used by the left information panel.
reimagined.config.show_folder_name.toolt: Shows the internal save folder name under the world title.
reimagined.config.show_cheats.tooltip: Shows whether cheats are enabled in the selected world.
reimagined.config.panel_opacity.tooltip: Controls the transparency of the left information panel background.
reimagined.config.panel_background_style: Chooses the background color style of the left information panel.
